_publications._publicationTitle: Genetically mediated Nf1 loss in mice promotes diverse radiation-induced tumors modeling second malignant neoplasms.

_contextSnippet: We performed microsatellite analysis of four markers spanning these two genes...to determine whether loss of heterozygosity (LOH) at these loci occurred
details: Successfully used for microsatellite analysis to determine loss of heterozygosity patterns in radiation-induced tumors
